states.ui_state_only: Landing inputs shown; no request committed.
states.input_pending: Inputs changed after the last committed request; displayed daily result remains unchanged.
states.loading: Committed request is being checked against governed projections.
states.governed_unavailable: Committed request has no exact approved named-place or alias record.
states.calculation_pending: Committed request is structurally valid but one or more approvals are absent.
states.calculated: Exact approved daily record rendered, or explicitly authorised local calculation completed.
states.invalid_input: Committed date, coordinates or timezone failed validation without substitution.
